items.name: 2WD Smart Robot Car Chassis Kit
items.description: Acrylic platform with 2× TT gearmotor mounts, caster wheel, mounting holes. Pre-drilled for common components.
items.notes: Get a kit that includes the motors and wheels. Search '2WD robot chassis kit Arduino' on Amazon. Most are compatible.

items.name: TT DC Gearmotor (6V, 200RPM)
items.description: Yellow TT motor with gear reduction. 3-6V operating. Dual shaft preferred (one side for wheel, one for encoder disc).
items.notes: Usually included in chassis kit. If buying separate, get the dual-shaft version for encoder support.

items.name: Rubber Wheels (65mm)
items.description: Press-fit wheels for TT motor D-shaft.
items.notes: Usually included in chassis kit.

items.name: Ball Caster Wheel
items.description: Metal ball caster, rear support point. Creates 3-point contact.
items.notes: Usually included in chassis kit.

items.name: Standoffs, screws, nuts (M3)
items.description: M3 nylon or brass standoffs for mounting Pi and sensor boards above chassis.
items.notes: Pack of assorted M3 standoffs. Need ~20mm height for Pi mount.

items.name: L298N Dual H-Bridge Motor Driver
items.description: Controls 2 DC motors independently. Direction + PWM speed. Built-in 5V regulator and flyback diodes.
items.notes: The red breakout board version. Has screw terminals for motors and power, header pins for logic.

items.name: Jumper Wires (Female-Female)
items.description: For Pi GPIO header to L298N logic pins.
items.notes: Need 6 for motor control (ENA, IN1-4, ENB) + 2 for power/ground.

items.name: Jumper Wires (Male-Female)
items.description: For sensor connections where one end needs breadboard or header.
items.notes: For HC-SR04, MPU-6050, LED connections.

items.name: 4× AA Battery Holder with Switch
items.description: Holds 4 AA batteries in series (6V). Switch for motor kill. Bare wire leads.
items.notes: Use NiMH rechargeable AA batteries (4 × 1.2V = 4.8V) or alkaline (4 × 1.5V = 6V). Either works with L298N.

items.name: AA NiMH Rechargeable Batteries (1.2V, 2000mAh)
items.description: Rechargeable batteries for motor supply.
items.notes: Eneloop or Amazon Basics are reliable. Get a charger too if you don't have one.

items.name: 5V USB Power Bank (5000mAh+)
items.description: Powers the Raspberry Pi via micro-USB. Must supply 2.5A continuous.
items.notes: Small, lightweight power bank. Must NOT have auto-shutoff (some banks turn off when current draw is low). Anker or similar quality brand.

items.name: HC-SR04 Ultrasonic Distance Sensor
items.description: Measures distance 2cm-400cm via ultrasonic ping. 5V logic.
items.notes: REQUIRES voltage divider on ECHO pin (5V→3.3V). See wiring diagram.

items.name: MPU-6050 IMU Module (GY-521)
items.description: 3-axis accelerometer + 3-axis gyroscope. I2C interface. 3.3V/5V compatible.
items.notes: The blue GY-521 breakout board. Provides orientation data for dead reckoning and tilt detection.

items.name: ArduCam IMX708 Camera Module
items.description: 12MP camera with autofocus. CSI interface.
items.notes: ALREADY HAVE THIS. Connected via CSI ribbon cable.

items.name: 1kΩ Resistor
items.description: HC-SR04 ECHO voltage divider (upper resistor).
items.notes: 1/4W through-hole. Part of voltage divider: 5V × 2k/(1k+2k) = 3.33V.

items.name: 2kΩ Resistor
items.description: HC-SR04 ECHO voltage divider (lower resistor, to GND).
items.notes: 1/4W through-hole. If you can't find 2kΩ, use 2× 1kΩ in series.

items.name: 220Ω Resistor
items.description: Current-limiting resistor for status LED.
items.notes: 1/4W through-hole.

items.name: Green LED (5mm)
items.description: Status indicator. Visible from outside chassis.
items.notes: One for status, one spare.

items.name: 100nF Ceramic Capacitor
items.description: EMI suppression across motor terminals.
items.notes: Solder one directly across each motor's terminals to suppress electrical noise from brushes. 2 per motor (one across terminals, one from each terminal to motor case).

items.name: Mini Breadboard (170-point)
items.description: For voltage divider and sensor connections. Mounts on chassis.
items.notes: Self-adhesive back sticks to chassis. Routes sensor wiring neatly.

items.name: Raspberry Pi 3 Model B
items.notes: Already set up with OS, camera, WiFi, SSH.

items.name: ArduCam IMX708 Camera
items.notes: Already connected and tested.

items.name: MicroSD Card (16GB+)
items.notes: Already flashed with Pi OS.
